note: Grand Palais (RMN), Paris. Hand-maintained capture fixture. Refresh each season from grandpalais.fr. Future-opening only; currently-running shows (Matisse 1941-1954, Hilma af Klint) omitted.

items.title: Cézanne et nous
items.description: ~180 works (about 70 by Cézanne) on Cézanne's afterlife among later artists
